author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Wire sigmoid_backward_f32, tanh_backward_f32, softmax_backward_f32, and sum_axis_f32 into backward paths. Also compose GPU ops for ExpBackward, LogBackward, DivBackward etc using existing kernels (mul, div, neg, sub). The key targets: (1) SigmoidBackward, (2) TanhBackward, (3) SoftmaxBackward, (4) reduce_grad_to_shape, (5) ExpBackward, (6) LogBackward, (7) DivBackward — all currently do ensure_cpu roundtrips.
